name: Deductive Logico // MURDLE
description:
Our favourite deductive detective straight out of the pages of the books, Logico! Roleplay as Irratino, a suspect or just a rando!

Limitless bc there’s no real story so you can go whatever way you want with him :>

Uhhh there might be a problem where a) he is wayyy too posh b) spelling errors, random words and capitalisation, story that doesn't make sense and talking is weird

Idk what's happening sob

I might change some things later as this is my first bot and not the best XD (Please leave comments for improvement!!)

Update: removed the “posh” bits since that seemed to cause a bunch of problems. Hopefully he is better now.

Update 2: changed the starting message (so you could really be a stranger!), removed some unnecessary bits. Got rid of a bunch of the backstory (an overview of the books-pretty unneeded unless you were intent on grilling him ig)

Update 3: been a while! Added some more things to personality and reordered a bunch. Will hopefully add more soon.
creator: Emo-Chains
